description_long: This is a modern, multi-functional bed with a plush, tufted white headboard and a black platform frame. The bed features a blue plaid blanket, two light blue pillows, and a visible mattress. Attached to the left side is a built-in chaise lounge with a white cushion and a small wooden compartment, which holds a smartphone. On either side of the bed are integrated nightstands: the left one is cylindrical and wooden, while the right one is a rectangular black unit with drawers. The bed frame appears to be upholstered in a combination of leather or faux leather and fabric, with wooden accents on the storage compartments. The overall design is contemporary and luxurious, suitable for upscale urban interiors.
description: A contemporary bed with a tufted white headboard, blue plaid bedding, and integrated side storage units, including a chaise lounge and nightstands. The frame combines black upholstery with wooden accents for a modern, luxurious look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted headboard, blue plaid blanket, two pillows, and both integrated nightstands with the chaise lounge on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chaise lounge, wooden compartment, and the thickness of the mattress and headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back of the bed frame and the backs of the nightstands.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the rectangular nightstand with drawers and the side profile of the headboard and chaise lounge.
